title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation Inc
status_note: Active, expires 2038-03-20 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: NI HTS charging-delay feedback control; contact resistance inside control transfer function
indep_claim_gist: Method: establish reference magnetic field; excite NI HTS coil; monitor field difference; control power-supply current via feedback loop whose transfer function incorporates magnet constant, turn-to-turn contact resistance and inductance.
notes: The magnet-aware converter-control fence to ~2038. Continuation US11551840B2 (fetched via FPO, grant 2023-01-10, PI-controller claims, same 2016 priority) = same family, deduped here. Rc enters as plant parameter identified via FIELD FEEDBACK, not as a manufacturing record/data interface - nearest art to the C12xC10 seam (U-001/U-009). GP cited-by (9 docs) chased via search: only NPL modeling papers surfaced, no rival NI-charging-control assignee.

title: Digital twins for energy efficient asset maintenance
status_note: Active, expires 2037-12-13 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: fleet of per-machine digital twins (nameplate + simulation model + runtime logs) for predictive maintenance
indep_claim_gist: System: multiple digital twins, each for a remotely located physical machine, containing product-nameplate data, simulation models and sensor-collected runtime logs; multiprocessor simulation platform executes twins for scalable model-based predictive maintenance.
notes: Broadest ACTIVE generic fence over per-unit fleet-twin architectures (~2037). Wording risk for any 'per-converter twin + runtime log cloud' claim; claims require executing simulation models per twin on the platform. U-031/U-018.

title: Health monitoring for power converter components
assignee: AES Global Holdings Pte Ltd (orig. Astec International)
status_note: Active, expires 2028-06-01 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: in-converter processor monitors capacitor/fan wear; per-component warning thresholds
indep_claim_gist: Power converter whose processor monitors degrading components (bulk capacitor, output capacitor, DC fan) via ripple voltage and fan-speed-vs-temperature; threshold crossings generate component-specific warning signals for proactive maintenance.
notes: CN-FAMILY (CN101387691B displayed on GP page). Oldest still-active in-converter health fence; displays expiry 2028-06-01 - ages out before a 2029/2030 launch (verify). Cited-by on GP: Oracle/Sun PSU-health, medical-device EOL - no magnet art. U-030/U-036.

title: Cryogenic magnet power supply
status_note: legal status not displayed on FPO full-text fetch; GP 503-blocked this run - nominal ~2038+ horizon from 2018 priority, indicative
claim_theme: cryostat-internal SMPS; controller applies ramp power then lower steady-state power
indep_claim_gist: Assembly: superconducting coil, cryostat, external DC source; SMPS with voltage step-down transformer located inside the cryostat; controller causes SMPS to supply larger power for ramp-up to operating current and smaller power at steady state; quench-protection energy dump.
notes: Full text fetched at FreePatentsOnline (playbook 1 fallback; GP 503 outage). TE's magnet-supply control estate; claims tied to in-cryostat SMPS hardware - outside room-temperature converter architectures. Wider family (WO/EP) not verified this run. U-025 adjacency.

title: Method for estimating the end of lifetime for a power semiconductor device
status_note: legal status not displayed on FPO fetch; GP 503-blocked - nominal ~2032 horizon, indicative
claim_theme: on-state voltage drift at fixed current/temperature during idle periods as EOL metric
indep_claim_gist: Method: establish device temperature; during non-operation periods apply predetermined current and repeatedly measure on-state voltage drop; track drift over time to estimate end of lifetime (solder-crack/bondwire degradation).
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Fences a convenient idle-window IGBT wear metric for fleet health telemetry (U-031/U-036) to ~2032; design-arounds display as expired/expiring: SSTDR [US9494657B2 expired-fee] and switching-time signatures [US6405154B1 expired-class].

title: State of health estimation of power converters
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP (nominal term to 2033-02-01); verify before reliance
claim_theme: spread-spectrum reflectometry (SSTDR) on live converter for degradation state
indep_claim_gist: Method: propagate non-interfering spread-spectrum test signal into an operational component between nodes; process reflections against predetermined impedance-matrix relationship to output a performance-degradation characteristic.
notes: Displays expired-fee - in-operando reflectometry SoH route may be free-standing (displays as expired - verify before reliance). GP cited-by shows later CN prognostics uptake. U-036.

title: Auto-tuning current loop compensation for power factor correction controller
status_note: legal status not displayed on FPO fetch; GP 503-blocked - nominal ~2034 horizon, indicative
claim_theme: iterative gain search minimizing control error auto-tunes digital current loop
indep_claim_gist: Method: set zero of digital control-loop transfer function; initialize gain; compute control error (reference vs input current); iteratively adjust gain; adopt gain yielding minimum control error.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Representative of crowded generic auto-tune art; narrow iterative-gain mechanism in PFC context - low read-through to magnet-load tuning built on identified L/Rc plant models.

title: Estimating operational life expectancy of an industrial device
status_note: A1 publication; grant/lapse status not displayed on FPO fetch, GP 503-blocked - treat as pending-unknown, claims can still change
claim_theme: cloud RUL for frequency-converter-class devices from mobile-collected environment + device load data
indep_claim_gist: Method: user mobile device collects environmental sensor readings near industrial device and receives usage/load data from it; remote server compares theoretical life expectancy against measured conditions; outputs remaining useful life and maintenance recommendation.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Drive-incumbent (ABB Oy) fleet-RUL posture marker; mobile-sensor claim element narrows scope. If granted, ~2038 horizon. U-031/U-034 context.

title: System for accelerator excitation curve conversion
title_zh: 一种用于加速器励磁曲线转换的系统
assignee: Institute of High Energy Physics CAS; Spallation Neutron Source Science Center
status_note: PCT displays 'Ceased' on GP (national phase run); CN family members displayed on GP page incl. grants CN116520211B, CN116699486B, CN116609713B, CN117388777B - re-verified at GP 2026-07-04 top-up
claim_theme: real-time bidirectional magnet-field/current excitation-curve conversion serving many supplies
indep_claim_gist: System: IBConvert module implemented as standard EPICS soft IOC performing real-time bidirectional field/current excitation-curve conversion for DC and pulse power supplies, plus EpicsDBGenerator (Java) module generating the required EPICS database files.
notes: CN-FAMILY. Originally biblio-depth at FPO/DEPATISnet during GP 503; full GP page fetched 2026-07-04 top-up - claims now read: EPICS-soft-IOC-specific wording narrows literal scope, but the family DID nationalize with multiple CN grants (displayed) - live CN fence on accelerator calibration-analytics; claim-chart the CN members before any U-018/U-031 calibration-software filing (counsel question).

title: Digital twin of twinned physical system
status_note: Abandoned as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: digital twin persists while asset offline; remaining-useful-life assessment
notes: Abandoned application - claims dead, but 2016-dated specification is prior art against broad generic 'converter digital twin' claims. CPC G06F17/5009 = pre-2020 code for G06F30/20 (verified this run).

title: Digital twin interface for operating wind farms
status_note: legal status not displayed on FPO fetch; GP 503-blocked - indicative
claim_theme: GUI displaying wind-farm digital twin with optimization controls
indep_claim_gist: GUI displaying a digital equivalent of a wind farm: environmental information, per-turbine digital representations, control icons showing current vs optimum operating conditions, farm-optimization control features.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Claims GUI-scoped; power converters appear only in background text - even GE's granted twins stop short of converter-level claims (density is platform/GUI, not converter-method).

title: Automated superconducting magnet ramp-up system and method
status_note: Expired - Fee Related as displayed on GP (2025-07-04); verify before reliance
claim_theme: parameter-constrained automated magnet ramp with staged transition
indep_claim_gist: Method: connect supply; identify constraining parameters (magnet current + temperature initially; frequency/field + temperature later); apply power; regulate ramp per parameters with automatic phase transition; conclude at predetermined target.
notes: Displays expired-fee - automated-ramp method primitives are expired-class (verify). Foundation for ramp-manager software features (U-018).

title: Method and apparatus for power electronics health monitoring
status_note: expired-class (1999 priority, nominal term ended ~2019); GP status display pending - indicative
claim_theme: switching-time signatures diagnose and predict device/gate-driver failure
indep_claim_gist: Method: issue switch commands via gate drivers; measure device switching times (turn-on/turn-off, normalized by current, temperature, bus voltage); assess diagnostic condition; predict failure of device or driver.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Oldest converter-prognostics foundation - switching-time health signatures are public-domain-class; anchors the expiry-horizon read.

title: EPI image based long term eddy current pre-emphasis calibration
status_note: expired-class (1999 priority); GP status display pending - indicative
claim_theme: measured per-system eddy time constants stored to configure gradient pre-emphasis
indep_claim_gist: Method: measure image size variation vs delay after pre-scan gradient pulse; fit exponential to extract eddy-current time constants; adjust gradient pre-emphasis conditioning from stored constants until test images match reference.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). Expired-class MRI lineage: per-MAGNET measured calibration data stored to parameterize the drive chain - closest conceptual ancestor of coil-record-driven drive parameterization, but data source is in-situ measurement, not manufacturing records. Seam nearest-art (WH-P10-1).

title: Smart sensor module
status_note: expired-class (1996 priority); GP status display pending - indicative
claim_theme: component carries per-unit stored corrections that configure its signal conditioning
indep_claim_gist: Smart sensor module storing per-unit fine/coarse gain-offset corrections plus temperature sensor; analog conditioning chain (adjustable offset, programmable-gain stages) applies stored corrections dynamically.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). IEEE1451/TEDS-class expired art: component ships with machine-readable per-unit data configuring its driver - generic ancestor bounding the C12xC10 seam; NO coil/converter analogue found in any pass (WH-P10-1).

title: Quench protection device of superconducting magnet system and working method thereof
assignee: Hefei CAS Ion Medical and Technical Devices Co Ltd
status_note: legal status not displayed on FPO fetch; GP 503-blocked - nominal ~2038 horizon, indicative
claim_theme: changeover-switch supply/dump sequencing driven by voltage-ratio quench logic
indep_claim_gist: Device: symmetric superconducting coils each with parallel protection diode; changeover switch connects coils to power supply (normal) or external resistor (quench); protection unit monitors voltage ratios to detect quench and drive the switch.
notes: Fetched via FPO fallback (GP 503). CN-FAMILY via displayed CN priority 201711310320.7 (Hefei CAS ecosystem, ASIPP-adjacent). Kept in P10 for its supply-side 'working method' sequencing claims; P09 cross-link (U-016/U-023).

title: Comprehensive stress test system, method and readable storage medium
title_zh: 一种综合应力测试系统、方法及可读存储介质
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
status_note: Application pending as displayed on GP (re-verified at GP 2026-07-04 top-up) - claims can change
claim_theme: combined temperature/input/load stress test rig with software method + storage-medium claims
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04 (outage-window DEPATISnet provenance superseded). Actionpower's method-claim posture: test-power software framed as system + method + computer-readable storage medium (standard CN software framing); combined multi-stress testing vs single-stress tradition. No magnet-fleet or calibration-analytics claims from this assignee in any pass. U-034.

title: Constant-voltage constant-current state switching method and control circuit for programmable power supply
title_zh: 可编程电源的恒压恒流状态切换方法及控制电路
assignee: Sichuan Injet Electric Co Ltd (四川英杰电气股份有限公司)
status_note: REJECTED after substantive examination 2016-09-21 as displayed on GP (re-verified 2026-07-04 top-up) - claims dead, prior art only
claim_theme: dual-PID minimum-select CV/CC transition control for programmable supplies
indep_claim_gist: Method/circuit: two PID controllers run simultaneously (voltage loop and current loop); minimum-select module adopts the smaller control quantity as output, giving seamless CV/CC mode transition without output jumps.
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04: application REJECTED 2016 - upgrade from prior 'grant unknown' DEPATISnet read. Injet's control-method posture record; dual-PID min-select is now pure prior art in CN. U-034.

title: Excitation power supply for superconducting magnet and operation method thereof
title_zh: 超导磁体用的励磁电源及其操作方法
assignee: Japan Superconductor Technology Inc (JASTEC, Kobe Steel group)
status_note: Divisional of CN201010536637.4; granted CN103560483B 2017-09-12; displays Expired - Fee Related on GP (anticipated expiration 2030-11-04) - verify before reliance (re-verified 2026-07-04 top-up)
claim_theme: excitation supply protect-state auto-recovery: realign output to coil current before reclosing
indep_claim_gist: Excitation supply and operation method: on recovery from protective short-circuit state, synchronize power-unit output current to the current circulating in the superconducting coil before opening the protective contact, preventing abrupt current steps.
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04: granted 2017 then DISPLAYS lapsed for fees (was 'grant unknown, nominal 2030' at DEPATISnet depth); priority corrected 2010->2009-11-04 (JP lineage). The nearest CN-jurisdiction magnet-supply ops-method art is foreign-owned AND displays dead - strengthens WH-P10-5. U-034/U-018.

title: IGBT module life prediction method under non-stationary working condition
title_zh: 一种非平稳工况下IGBT模块寿命预测方法
assignee: Beihang University (北京航空航天大学)
status_note: Granted CN109738773B 2021-07-16; displays Expired - Fee Related on GP (re-verified 2026-07-04 top-up) - verify before reliance
claim_theme: mission-profile electro-thermal model + damage accumulation predicts IGBT MTTF
indep_claim_gist: Method: electro-thermal device model with Simulink-decoupled parameters; junction-temperature monitoring via thermo-sensitive electrical parameters plus Kalman-filter prediction; rainflow counting extracts stress cycles under non-stationary profiles; cumulative-damage model outputs lifetime.
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04: granted 2021 then DISPLAYS lapsed for fees - the representative CN university IGBT-prognostics wave record is now claims-read (was abstract depth) and its fence displays dead. Crowds GENERIC converter-RUL novelty in CN as prior art. U-034/U-036.

title: Method, apparatus and system for power source failure prediction
title_zh: 用于电源故障预测的方法、装置和系统
status_note: Granted CN101165633B 2012-10-10; displays Expired - Fee Related on GP (nominal expiration 2027-09-21) - re-verified 2026-07-04 top-up
claim_theme: IT power-supply failure prediction via equivalent-impedance rate-of-change monitoring
indep_claim_gist: Method: measure DC-supply voltage under load via multiple sense wires; compute actual rate of change of equivalent impedance from successive measurements; compare against threshold to predict power-source failure.
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04 (claims now read; was abstract depth): granted then displays lapsed. Evidence that early CN-jurisdiction PSU-prognostics art is FOREIGN-filed IT-server art (Intel 2007) and already dead per display - the CN 预测性维护+电源 space predates and ignores magnet converters. U-034 context.

title: Current measuring circuit and method in varying high-intensity magnetic field environment
title_zh: 变化的强磁场环境下电流测量电路及方法
assignee: Institute of Plasma Physics CAS (中国科学院等离子体物理研究所, ASIPP)
status_note: Granted CN101915867B 2012-09-05; lapsed for non-payment 2013-07-27 as displayed on GP (re-verified 2026-07-04 top-up)
claim_theme: opposed dual-Hall current measurement immune to time-varying fusion stray field
indep_claim_gist: Circuit/method: two Hall elements mounted with opposite normal directions near the tokamak so the time-varying poloidal stray-field contributions cancel; secondary comparing/amplifying stage (two op-amps) recovers the target current signal.
notes: Re-verified at GP 2026-07-04 (claims now read): granted 2012, LAPSED 2013 for fees - hard evidence for the 'institute point fixes are filed then abandoned' read; nominal-2030 caveat replaced by displayed 2013 lapse. P06 cross-link; supports WH-P10-5. U-018/U-034.
